global_description: Medium-sized wild cat with a muscular, sleek body, covered in golden-yellow fur with distinctive black rosettes and spots. It has a broad head, powerful limbs, and a long tail. The fur is short and dense, providing camouflage in its natural habitat.

part_details.head: Broad with small rounded ears and sharp eyes
part_details.body: Muscular, sleek, covered in golden-yellow fur with black rosettes
part_details.limbs: Powerful and muscular, adapted for climbing and running
part_details.tail: Long and thick, aiding in balance
part_details.fur: Short, dense, golden-yellow with black rosettes

spatial_relations: Limbs attached to sides of body
